mapper.select: SELECT commentId, meetingId, writerId, parentCommentId, content, createdAt, isDeleted FROM comments WHERE commentId = #{commentId}

SELECT c.commentId, c.writerId, u.nickname, c.content, c.createdAt, c.isDeleted, u.profileImage FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.writerId=u.userId WHERE c.meetingId=#{meetingId} AND c.isDeleted = 0 ORDER BY c.createAt ORDER BY c.createdAt ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments( meetingId, writerId, parentCommentId, content ) VALUES( #{meetingId}, #{writerId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{content} )
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET isDeleted=1, content="삭제된 댓글입니다." WHERE commentId=#{commentId}
